contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Key Frames

- 00:14.833 ![](keyFrame.14833.jpg)

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI collaboration logo, followed by a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology. A speaker explains the importance of having high-quality data to create a good voice model, mentioning the development of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and generate natural-sounding voices. Visuals include audio waveform displays and shots of data centers and server rooms, emphasizing the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

Summary.valueString: The video transitions to showcasing the Flight Simulator environment, featuring detailed aerial views of landscapes, including mountains, castles, and coastal areas, highlighting the realistic graphics and immersive experience of the simulator. The visuals emphasize the integration of advanced AI technology with the Flight Simulator to enhance realism.
